offer: For insurance fraud investigators processing 5–15 claims/month, inefficient identification of fraudulent patterns causes delayed investigations. We provide automated flagging of suspicious claims instead of manual review of claims.
problem: Identifying fraudulent claims in a timely manner
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for insurance fraud investigators
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to 20-50 investigators with demo video
Community forums where investigators share tools
try_it: Let users try claim pattern monitoring on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with one-liner and CTA
Short demo video of manual workflow
Offer early-access onboarding for first users
Post weekly updates in relevant communities
